creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
If you look at the "see also" section, any links to man pages containing an underscore are incorrectly referenced.

E.G. The following page links pam_passwdqc(8) as "passwddqc" and pwd_mkdb as "mkdb"

https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=passwd&apropos=0&sektion=0&manpath=FreeBSD+13.2-RELEASE+and+Ports&arch=default&format=html
